Four healthy crabapple trees. Ready for harvesting as of August 8th. Falling Fruit season: August-August.

On the SW corner there is a large apple tree, heavily laden with green apples with a red blush, not treated and don't appear to be too wormy.  About 25% of the tree hangs into the street. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

Just behind the front gate of the house on the NW corner of the roundabout.  A small tree, but with big beautiful pears, appear to be the Bosc variety. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
Apple Tree outside of dentists office.

Young tree with small,crisp apples around the beginning of August 18'.
Tree is in front of a business. Access: Private.
Two Plum trees overhang the sidewalk, small plums but they are super sweet. Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Raspberry patches were spotted in a couple of locations along the Apex trail. Access: Public.
